source_pgm_pre_pass41.description: Party-HUD status-box row rendered by the full M11 game-view probe (361/361 invariants passed) on main at pass-40 (pre-pass-41), V1 default mode, stride 77 / slot W 71.
source_pgm_pre_pass41.interpretation: Four status-box frames at x = 12..78, 89..155, 166..232, 243..309 (stride 77, slot W ~71). Right edge of last slot extends to x=309.

source_pgm_post_pass41.reproduction: on main after pass 41, run ./run_firestaff_m11_game_view_probe.sh, copy verification-m11/game-view/party_hud_statusbox_gfx.pgm
source_pgm_post_pass41.description: Same probe, same screenshot, V1 default mode after pass 41: stride 69 / slot W 67.
source_pgm_post_pass41.interpretation: Four status-box frames at x = 12..78, 81..147, 150..216, 219..285 (stride 69, slot W 67). 2-px black gap between adjacent slot frames (at x=79..80, 148..149, 217..218). Right edge of last slot at x=285 (saving 24 px vs pre-pass-41 x=309).

slot_frame_width_dm1_source.name: C007_GRAPHIC_STATUS_BOX
slot_frame_width_dm1_source.verified_by: M11 asset-loader probe invariant INV_GV_205 (asserts graphic 7 decompresses to 67x29)
